achievements.title: Do Not Be Alarmed
achievements.description: SA - Dam - Complete the mission without triggering a single alarm
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: Run, Bond, Run
achievements.description: 00 Agent - Dam -  Install the modem while only killing one enemy
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: Silent, But Deadly
achievements.description: Agent - Facility - Gain Access to the lab only using the pistol (no switching)
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: For Science!
achievements.description: SA - Facility - Complete the mission without killing a single scientist
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: Spectre
achievements.description: 00 Agent - Facility - Complete the mission without losing any health
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: Cool Guys Don't Look at Explosions
achievements.description: SA - Runway -  Have the missile battery explode after boarding the plane
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: Getting Creative
achievements.description: 00 Agent - Runway - Complete without firing a single bullet [Explosives only]
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: Access Denied
achievements.description: SA - Surface - Set off the alarm then go on to complete the mission
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: License to Kill
achievements.description: SA - Bunker -  Kill 50 or more enemies and complete the mission
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: Let Them Watch
achievements.description: 00 Agent - Bunker - Complete objectives C,D, E  before destroying all cameras
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: Slapper
achievements.description: Agent - Silo - Kill 10 enemies by slapping them and finish the mission unarmed
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: Ouromov's Secret
achievements.description: SA - Silo -  Open the Silo roof in the room opposite to the entrance of section 4-K2
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: Silo(w) Blow
achievements.description: 00 Agent - Silo -  Get 10 kills while crouching and aiming down the sights
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: A Consummate Professional
achievements.description: SA - Frigate - Complete mission with "Ammo on Screen" off, and no autoaim
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: The Negotiator
achievements.description: 00 Agent - Frigate -  Rescue all hostages and complete the mission
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: Welcome to Severnaya, Comrade
achievements.description: Agent - Surface II - Kill an enemy after the ending cinematic has commenced
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: Hatching A Plan
achievements.description: SA - Surface II - Find the hatch that has been welded shut
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: Over Protective
achievements.description: SA - Bunker II - Complete objectives A, B and C before letting Natalya out of cell
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: Going Out On A Limb
achievements.description: SA - Statue - Get 50 or more limb hits before rescuing Natalya
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: Auto Reloader
achievements.description: 00 Agent - Statue - Complete all objectives without current clip getting to 1
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: Mad Hatter
achievements.description: SA - Archives - Shoot 5 hats off guards heads
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: Lambs to The Slaughter
achievements.description: 00 Agent - Archives - Kill 50 enemies before leaving the interrogation room
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: Squish
achievements.description: Agent - Streets - Kill 10 enemies while on the tank without firing
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: No Tank You
achievements.description: SA - Streets - Complete all objectives without riding the tank
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: You Call That a Road Block?
achievements.description: 00 Agent - Streets - Destroy the jeeps "blocking" the level exit with the tank
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: From Russia With Love
achievements.description: 00 Agent - Depot - Enter the train with the KF7 Soviet equipped and have the 2 guards aboard be killed by it
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: Ever The Gentleman
achievements.description: Agent - Train - Complete objective C before completing objective B
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: Xenia Onabottom
achievements.description: 00 Agent - Train - Hit both Ouromov and Xenia when given the chance
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: A Helping Hand
achievements.description: Agent - Jungle - Without firing a bullet, get 15 kills via Natalya or explosive (cannot be unarmed)
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: We All Know That Trick
achievements.description: 00 Agent - Jungle - Eliminate Xenia without going back over the bridge
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: Peek-A-Boo
achievements.description: Agent - Control - Get 10 kills while peeking (aiming down the sights  leaning)
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: Let Boris Lead the Way
achievements.description: SA - Control - Collect the hidden Body Armor
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: James, You Were Wonderful!
achievements.description: 00 Agent - Control - Destroy 5 drone guns without losing 2 or more health pips
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: A Man of Precision
achievements.description: Agent - Caverns - Kill 15 enemies without changing weapon or reloading
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: Never Say Never Again
achievements.description: SA - Caverns - Complete the mission without aiming down the sights
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: From the Cradle to the Grave
achievements.description: Agent - Cradle - Complete obj. B, then complete A before 2.42 on countdown
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: The Long Way Round
achievements.description: SA - Cradle - Complete objective A and B without destroying both Drone Guns
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: For England, James
achievements.description: 00 Agent - Cradle - Crouch from level start until completing obj. A and B
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: The Glass Door Trick
achievements.description: SA - Aztec - Complete the mission without killing Jaws
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: Well, Here's To Us
achievements.description: 00 Agent - Aztec - Kill Jaws
achievements.author: Stronghammer22

achievements.title: Loa of Voodoo
achievements.description: Agent - Egyptian - Kill Baron Samedi 3 times without picking up the golden gun
